intro: APT33, CyberAv3ngers, and Lotus Wiper were the most frequently observed threat actors in 18 articles covering critical infrastructure from April 12 to April 28, 2026. The coverage highlighted CVE-2026-24032, a vulnerability with a CVSS score of 7.3, and focused on sectors including energy, utilities, and manufacturing. Affected regions spanned the United States, North America, Europe, Asia-Pacific, and global networks. The reporting included 10 high-severity incidents, 3 critical, 3 informational, and 1 medium-severity event.
